name: lean-ctx — savings dropped >50% week-over-week
message:
Token savings for {{host.name}} dropped more than 50% versus the same day last week.

Likely causes (lean-ctx runbook order):
1. Agents bypassing lean-ctx tools (check `Auto-mode sources` in ctx_metrics)
2. A workload change (fewer agent sessions overall — compare leanctx.tools.calls)
3. A misconfigured update (compression disabled, allowlist blocking)

Dashboard: lean-ctx — Token Economy. Docs: docs/integrations/datadog.md @ops-team
